metadata.description: Product engineering skills for Claude Code: ship marketing content, review design, audit repos, keep dependencies safe, and turn plans into Gantarr timelines.

plugins.name: product-skills
plugins.description: Five product engineering skills in one plugin: blogger (commits → marketing content), design-review (UI critique), sentinel (repo risk audit), warden (safe dependency patching), and gantarr (plan → importable Gantt timeline).
